texto: In class I was out of place because I could so easily be distracted from concepts by metaphors and facts. Clearly, I was less intelligent than I had hoped, and I felt frustrated by an inarticulate notion that something was wrong if old material was processed as if the immediate past and the uncertain future had no bearing on it.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ruth Klüger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de temas ligados a reflexao. O trecho “In class I was out of place because I could so easily be distracted from concepts by metaphors an…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que reflexao, history, holocaust pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de holocaust.

texto: The death camps seem easier to comprehend if we put them all into the basket of one vast generalization, which the term "death camps" implies, but in the process we mythologize or trivialize them.
explicacao: Citação de Ruth Klüger sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The death camps seem easier to comprehend if we put them all into the basket of one vast generali…” articula reflexao, history, holocaust em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como luto e termino.

texto: How are we ever going to understand what happens when a civilization comes apart at the seams, as it did in Germany, if we fail to see the most glaring distinctions, such as the gender gap?
explicacao: Pergunta retórica de Ruth Klüger que provoca temas ligados a reflexao. Ao questionar “How are we ever going to understand what happens when a civilization comes apart at the seams, as…”, o texto convida o leitor a revisar crenças sobre reflexao, feminism, wwii, com foco em termino e wwii.

texto: I fell on my feet and found my bearings because of these. I could talk to them. They listened and answered, for or against, but always weighing what they had heard, unlike my mother, who used language for manipulation, not to express an opinion or state a fact. What sounded like a fact might be a lie, and every opinion was tailored for the moment.
explicacao: Metáfora atribuída a Ruth Klüger: compara elementos do cotidiano para falar de passagem do tempo e prioridades. O trecho “I fell on my feet and found my bearings because of these. I could talk to them. They listened and…” usa imagem concreta para lembrar que amizade, relationships, opinion pedem movimento e interpretação pessoal, em tom de relationships.

texto: The old idea, or rather the old prejudice, that women are protected by men was so deeply ingrained in that society that they overlooked what was the most obvious, that is, that the weakest and the disadvantaged are the most exposed.
explicacao: Citação de Ruth Klüger sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “The old idea, or rather the old prejudice, that women are protected by men was so deeply ingraine…” articula reflexao, holocaust, oppression em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como dia-chuvoso e oppression.
